title: Add safety audit merge gate (Golden Test 23)
problem: ticket-024 documents the golden merge gate, but Golden Test 23 requires the safety audit to produce machine-readable pass/fail output and block dangerous or leaky builder changes before merge.
evidence: docs/agents/00_GOLDEN_TESTS.md Test 23: safety audit blocks dangerous or leaky changes.
acceptance_criteria: Safety audit full run returns machine-readable JSON with status, blocked_reasons, checked_routes, checked_exports, and checked_secrets.
Golden Test 23 verifies audit is not prose-only and fails closed on forbidden public write/ingestion/agent routes.
non_goals: Do not add public write routes.
Do not implement CI pipeline wiring.
Do not implement live safety evaluator agent merge ownership.
